description: 4 MOBILIZING GREAT ARMY CHINESE WOULD RESTORE RULER HOLD OUT INDUCEMENTS TO OUR MILITARY MEN ENLIST NATIONAL GUARDSMEN Orientals Gain Knowledge of American Tactic for Use In Planning Cam palgn Against Government of Empress Dowager f Cnntlmwt from Fai One ment officials whose knowledge ot the affair cannot be questioned Fifteen Thousand Armed Chinese From the most conservative estimate there are 15000 armed Chinese equipped with the most modern Improved rifles i under thorough military organization iln the United States These men are divided Into numerous companies and scattered over the country two com panies being stationed In Los Angeles They are officered by men said to be duly commissioned by the socalled Chinese Reform Army and paid from funds of that political organization which has for its object the restoration of the deposed Chinese emperor Kwong Sul to power In order to evade th strict require ments of the Chinese exclusion act these Chinese soldiers assume to be military students For Instance In Los Angeles they have their armory which they term an academy having secured as they claim a charter from the Cali fornia state government permitting them to conduct a military academy Many Inducements Held Out A
